rules.rule_text:
rule Invoke_Mimikatz
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects Invoke-Mimikatz String"
		author = "Florian Roth"
		reference = "https://github.com/clymb3r/PowerShell/tree/master/Invoke-Mimikatz"
		date = "2016-08-03"

	strings:
		$x1 = "Invoke-Mimikatz" wide fullword

	condition:
		1 of them
}
